overview.short: Mangalgad, also known as Kangori, is a fort in Maharashtra near the village of Gogawalewadi.
overview.description: Mangalgad, also known as Kangori, is a fort in Maharashtra near the village of Gogawalewadi. Kangori, or Mangalgad Fort, is in the Mahad sub-division about eleven miles (18 km) east by south from Mahad town.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Varandha Ghat
topPlaces.description: Varandha Ghat (Marathi: वरंधा घाट) is a mountain passage located between NH4 and Konkan in Maharashtra, India for road traffic. Situated on the crest of the Western Ghat mountain ranges, Varandha Ghat is noted for its surroundings, comprising scenic waterfalls, lakes and dense woods.

topPlaces.name: Birwadi
topPlaces.description: Birwadi is a census town in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Varandha Ghat (Marathi: वरंधा घाट) is a mountain passage located between NH4 and Konkan in Maharashtra, India for road traffic. Situated on the crest of the Western Ghat mountain ranges, Varandha Ghat is noted for its surroundings, comprising scenic waterfalls, lakes and dense woods.
Birwadi is a census town in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mangalgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mangalgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mangalgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mangalgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mangalgad?
faq.a: Stays in Mangalgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mangalgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Varandha Ghat, Birwadi.
